MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING / TO SPECIALLY SET TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) AND (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 19759780) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL, GALEN MICHAEL, PAULA HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
DECLARATION OF TIMOTHY F. PEARCE IN SUPPORT OF MO FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING (TRANSACTION ID # 19759780) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL, GALEN MICHAEL, PAULA

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-05-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS GALEN MICHAEL AND PAULA MICHAEL'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 9/15/08 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206; PLAINTIFF TO CONTACT DEPT. 220 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES AND SEND NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 30 DAYS FROM TODAY, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BY 50 DAYS FROM TODAY. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR#4280 (D206)
